name: latchbio-integration
tagline: Reference skill for building/deploying bioinformatics pipelines on the LatchBio platform (workflows, Registry data, GPU tasks).
verdict: Clean, purely-documentary skill for the Latch SDK: no code exfiltrates secrets, no piped remote execution, no obfuscation, and it points to official docs.latch.bio / github.com/latchbio/latch. Minor quality gaps only: the frontmatter description is keyword-heavy rather than trigger-focused, no explicit output contract, and idempotency of `latch register` on

highlights.summary: No 'when NOT to use this skill' guidance anywhere in the file; a user could misapply it to non-Latch bioinformatics tasks with no signpost against it.

No explicit statement of what artifact/output using the skill produces (e.g., expected files created, confirmation message format) — it reads as reference documentation rather than a task with a defin
Doc never states whether re-running `latch register` or `latch init` on an already-initialized workflow is safe/idempotent or creates duplicate versions.
